| D1  | G4 schema refactor — per-type allOf with unevaluatedProperties | S2 | schema | Move per-type extension fields from `file_record` top-level `properties` into `allOf/then` blocks so cross-type field pollution is rejected (a memory record currently accepts `runner_os` without error). Proper fix requires bumping schema to draft-2019-09 and switching the harness to `Ajv2019` — `unevaluatedProperties: false` is unavailable in draft-07. Current schema passes all 8 validation tests; concern is theoretical. Target: schema v1.1 bump OR Piece 3 Step S2 validator-library work, whichever lands first.
